Get Model Parameters and Statistics

Source: R/model-output-tables.R
get_param2.Rd

Internal function to extract and format model parameters with estimates and statistics

Usage

get_param2(
  model_number,
  count_model,
  shrinkage = "etasd",
  models_folder = "models",
  spec_pk = NULL
)

Arguments

model_number

Character string. Model name/number

count_model

Integer. Number of models being compared

shrinkage

Character string. Type of shrinkage to report ("etasd", "etavr", "ebvsd", "ebvvr")

models_folder

Character string. Path to models folder

spec_pk

List. Optional parameter specifications with labels and units

Value

A formatted data frame with model parameters and statistics
